series_metadata.series_description: These reports are due within 45 days of the end of the calendar quarter. Each money transmitter licensee must report unaudited unconsolidated financial statements; a statement of the number of transactions in this state, the dollar amount of those transactions, and the number and dollar amounts of those transactions currently outstanding; a schedule of permissible investments; a schedule of locations of the licensee and authorized delegates.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until report is filed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
